description: Configure a secure, multi-tenant environment for a new client 'Alpha Corp' in GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/) using credentials 'admin' / 'Admin123!'. Establish an isolated workspace named 'alpha_corp' (URI: http://www.alphacorp.com/data) and a PostGIS store named 'alpha_ds' connecting to the 'gis' database (Host: gs-postgis, User: geoserver, Password: geoserver123). Publish the 'ne_rivers' table as a layer named 'secure_rivers' with the title 'Alpha Corp Secure Hydrography'. The configuration must ensure the layer is hidden from global WFS capabilities but remains accessible via workspace-specific WFS capabilities.
